children.value: A wavefunction for a one-electron system is called an orbital.
For an atomic system such as the hydrogen atom, it is called an
The orbital plots demonstrate the shapes of the orbitals, but this does not tell us anything about the radial extent (i.e., how far the orbital reaches).

children.html: ZZZ

children.value: is increased, the radial extent decreases. This indicates that for higher nuclear charge the electrons reside closer to the nucleus.
